# @platform/tooling-docker

Container build tooling: Dockerfiles, multi-stage build patterns, and image publishing scripts.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/tooling-docker
Version: 0.1.0
Component: tooling-docker
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: delivery
Bounded context: container-build
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: tooling
Class: active.tooling
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: annual
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: false
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Maintain canonical Dockerfiles for each deployable application surface
- Define multi-stage build patterns to minimize production image size
- Provide image tagging and publishing scripts for CI integration
- Enforce base image version pinning and security update cadence

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own container orchestration or runtime (infra-aws)
- Does not define CI pipeline stages (tooling-ci)
- Does not manage container registry configuration

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Dockerfiles are consumed by tooling-ci to build and push images in CI
- Build scripts can be run locally for development image builds

## Operational notes

- Base images must be pinned to digests in production Dockerfiles
- Non-root user must be configured in all production-stage images
